keyFindings.description: Health poll at line 27 has no timeout — infinite loop if serve fails to start
Name mismatch: test.md and plan.md reference 'smoke-testing' but file is named 'smoke-test.md'
No pass/fail criteria in Step 3 — tester has no way to assess smoke test outcome
Missing session continuity pattern (resume existing session for retries) — required by issue spec
Cleanup should suppress tmux kill-session errors
sleep 30 is a magic number with no sizing guidance
Hardcoded binary path could be extracted to a variable

note: Review found 1 P1, 3 P2, and 3 P3 issues in the smoke testing skill.
